allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./parser.js'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.parse\('INSERT {\\"id\\":1}'\)\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.parse\('SELECT WHERE id = 1'\)\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.parse\('DELETE WHERE name = \\"alice\\"'\)\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p.parse\('SHOW WAL'\)\)\);")
